description: Warm-toned graphic in portrait format. The photograph shows a two-story American suburban home (a gray Victorian or Folk-Victorian house with a covered front porch, decorative gables, and surrounding green trees) at golden hour; the porch and windows glow with warm light, an American flag hangs from a porch column, a mailbox stands at the curb, and the image carries a heavy sepia and amber vintage filter. Centered over the house in a white serif font (with a subtle glow) is the slogan 'Recapture the Dream.' A small white Department of Labor seal sits just above the text. Per the tweet, the message credits President Trump with 'recapturing the American Dream,' reversing 'Biden-era wage declines,' helping Americans afford homes, and ensuring 'American Jobs go to American Workers.'
